name: Twitter Advanced Search Scraper
recommended_when: The user wants to monitor posts that mention a competitor brand or keyword on Twitter/X
The user wants keyword-based or advanced-search discovery before deeper collection
keep_reason: Primary Twitter/X discovery template for brand mention monitoring.

name: Twitter Advanced Search Comments Scraper
recommended_when: The user needs both Twitter/X posts and the comments under those posts
The user wants a combined workflow instead of a separate discovery step and comment step
keep_reason: Preferred combined Twitter/X workflow when content and comments are both needed.

name: Twitter Scraper (by Account URL)
recommended_when: The user already has Twitter/X profile URLs
The user wants competitor account monitoring rather than keyword discovery
keep_reason: Best fit when the user already has competitor account URLs.

name: Twitter (X) Comments Scraper
recommended_when: The user already has many Twitter/X post URLs
The user wants replies or comments without a separate discovery stage
keep_reason: Best direct comments template when post URLs are already known.

name: Twitter People Search Scraper
recommended_when: The user wants to discover which Twitter/X accounts are worth monitoring
The user starts from a topic or keyword rather than from known profile URLs
keep_reason: Useful discovery step for finding candidate competitor accounts.

name: TikTok Search Scraper (No Login Required)
recommended_when: The user wants TikTok videos mentioning a competitor brand or keyword
keep_reason: Primary TikTok discovery template for brand mention monitoring.

name: TikTok Profile Scraper
recommended_when: The user already has TikTok profile URLs
The user wants competitor account monitoring on TikTok

name: TikTok Video Details & Comments Scraper
recommended_when: The user wants TikTok video comments or replies
The user wants comment collection for downstream sentiment analysis

name: TikTok Video Details Scraper
recommended_when: The user already has TikTok video URLs and needs detail enrichment without comments
keep_reason: Useful TikTok detail-only option when comments are not needed.

name: Reddit Search Scraper
recommended_when: The user wants Reddit posts mentioning a competitor brand or keyword
keep_reason: Primary Reddit discovery template for mention monitoring.

name: Reddit Subreddit Scraper
recommended_when: The user wants to monitor a competitor-related subreddit or community

name: Reddit Post & Comments Scraper
recommended_when: The user already has Reddit post URLs
The user needs comments for downstream sentiment analysis

name: YouTube Video List Scraper
recommended_when: The user wants YouTube videos mentioning a competitor brand or topic
keep_reason: Primary YouTube discovery template for mention monitoring.

name: YouTube Channel Scraper
recommended_when: The user wants to monitor a competitor YouTube channel

name: YouTube Comments & Replies Scraper
recommended_when: The user needs YouTube comments or replies for downstream sentiment analysis

name: YouTube Transcript Scraper
recommended_when: The user wants to verify whether a YouTube video mentions a competitor brand
The user needs transcript text as supporting evidence
keep_reason: Useful enrichment step for mention monitoring.
